title: CloudPets
description: CloudPets is based on a Minecraft mod called InventoryPets. Adds over 41 different pets and 4 new structures to the game
body:
# About
CloudPets is based on a Minecraft mod called InventoryPets. CloudPets is a coding project I wanted to share. There will be bugs, features, and re-tweaks to the plugin that can break previous versions.
This plugin is mainly for fun and I will try my best not to break the plugin during each update. Later ill add a system that can update old pets to newer pets if they ever get changed.

# Features

- Random Sky Clouds Generate
- Cloud Pets has 41 Different working pets with their own special abilities
- Pets give Items after time
- Pets have their own crafting recipe (Some pets don't because they need to be found normally)
- You can turn off any Pet
- You can turn off any Pet's Crafting Recipe

TODO:
- Add Mobs to defend Dungeons
- Add More Pets

# Commands
**/cloudpets** - This lets you grab any cloudpet from a GUI  
 **/dungeon [DungeonType]** - Lets you search for a specific dungeon in a nearby radius. Some dungeons are more rare than others.

# Permissions

**cloudpets.inventory** - This lets you use the /cloudpet command

<details>
  <summary>All Pet Permissions</summary>
  
Any other pets missed will follow the same format
```
   cloudpets.anvilpet
   cloudpets.bedpet
   cloudpets.blazepet
   cloudpets.chestpet
   cloudpets.chickenpet
   cloudpets.cloudpet
   cloudpets.cowpet
   cloudpets.craftingtablepet
   cloudpets.creeperpet
   cloudpets.doublechestpet
   cloudpets.enchantingtablepet
   cloudpets.enderchestpet
   cloudpets.endermanpet
   cloudpets.furnacepet
   cloudpets.ghastpet
   cloudpets.gravepet
   cloudpets.housepet
   cloudpets.irongolempet
   cloudpets.jukeboxpet
   cloudpets.leashpet
   cloudpets.magmacubepet
   cloudpets.mooshroompet
   cloudpets.netherpet
   cloudpets.ocelotpet
   cloudpets.pigpet
   cloudpets.pixiepet
   cloudpets.potionpet
   cloudpets.pufferfishpet
   cloudpets.sheeppet
   cloudpets.slimepet
   cloudpets.snowgolempet
   cloudpets.spiderpet
   cloudpets.squidpet
   cloudpets.torchpet
   cloudpets.witherpet
   cloudpets.wolfpet
   cloudpets.spongepet
   cloudpets.miningpet
   cloudpets.applepet
   cloudpets.cheetahpet
   cloudpets.silverfishpet
   cloudpets.purpliciouscowpet
   cloudpets.quiverpet
   cloudpets.lootpet
 ```
</details>
